summary: Comprehensive testing of Analiyx Analytics Platform - Iteration 3. Tested new AI Visibility (GPT-5.2 powered) and Cashfree payment integration features, plus regression tests for all previously implemented features. All APIs and UI components working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: AI Visibility uses GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations - LIVE integration working
Cashfree payment uses PRODUCTION keys - order creation working with real payment_session_id
MOCKED: Email notification in contact form (SMTP not configured) - form saves to DB correctly
NOT IMPLEMENTED: Items 10 (Gmail/Microsoft signup), 11 (email verification), 18 (Slack integration)
seed_data_creation: AI analyses and payment orders created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 19 features tested (except items 10, 11, 18 which are not yet implemented). AI Visibility with GPT-5.2 works and returns 5 score cards, strengths, improvements, and AI recommendations. Cashfree payment creates real production orders with payment_session_id. Trial badge shows 49 days (admin extended). All admin dashboard tabs working with INR formatting.
